title: bee perf report CLI (--html/--out/--since/--json) + registry + tests
action: Add a `perf report` verb to the CLI. (1) command-registry.mjs: add a perf.report entry (properties: html boolean, out string, since string, limit string, json boolean; examples: ['bee perf report --json']). (2) bee.mjs: import scanProjects, renderMatrixHtml, writeReport, reportHtmlPath, scanCachePath, claudeProjectsRoot from perf.mjs; add HANDLERS row 'perf.report': handlePerfReport; add 'html' to FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS (json already present); add 'report' to the perfUsageFallback Use: list. (3) handlePerfReport(root, flags): runs scanProjects(claudeProjectsRoot(), {cachePath: scanCachePath(), since: flags.since}); if --html (or --out given) writes the HTML via writeReport (to --out if given, else reportHtmlPath()) and returns {result:{path, projects:scan.projects.length}, text:`report written -> <path>`}; else returns {result: scan, text: a compact per-project one-line summary}; --json returns the scan object. Handler returns {result,text}, no console.log. (4) test_bee_cli.mjs: add 'perf.report' example run block BEFORE the 'every registry entry executed' coverage check; the CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is already redirected to a transcript-less temp dir so the scan returns empty projects — assert exit 0 and (for --json) an object/array shape. The perf group Use: line now lists report — the DA5 bijection needs perfUsageFallback + registry in sync.

truths: perf.report registered at all three surfaces (registry, HANDLERS, perfUsageFallback Use: list includes report).
handlePerfReport writes a self-contained HTML to reportHtmlPath (or --out) and returns {result,text}; --json returns the scan.
test_bee_cli perf.report example runs (transcript-less temp env) exit 0, placed before the coverage check.
prohibitions: Do NOT re-implement scanning here (import from perf.mjs).
Do NOT edit .bee/bin copies here (mirror step is perf-report-4).
No perf example writing to the real global dir (BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR temp already set in the test).

trace.outcome: bee perf report CLI (--html/--out/--since/--json) wired: registry + handler + fallback(report) + html flag; test_bee_cli 138/0; smoke: --html writes matrix, --json returns scan
trace.verification_evidence: { "deliberate_exceptions": ["New perf.report CLI verb; no prior behavior. Proof = test_bee_cli 138/0 incl. the perf.report example + DA5 bijection, and a real --html/--json smoke run."] }
trace.verify_output: test_bee_cli: 138 passed, 0 failed (incl. perf.report example + bijection with report verb)
